{{Quote|Whatever comes, let's bear it with honor! We die, if need be, for the sake of the Rebellion!|Sami to Han Solo and Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Meow" />}}
The '''Cantrosians''' were [[Humanoid/Legends|sapient]] [[Cat/Legends|felinoids]] indigenous to [[Cantros 7]]. Scratches from their paws would result in [[Cantrosian-scratch fever]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Cantrosians were staunch supporters of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], which led to an [[Skirmish in the Cantros system|internecine conflict]] when a [[Durne|rogue operative]] tried to play factions against each other by insinuating [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sympathies among certain Cantrosian groups.

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|Hey, Whiskers! Step over here and repeat that part about the lies!|Han Solo to Durne|<ref name="Meow" />}}
Cantrosians were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Cat/Legends|feline]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]. They possessed triangular [[Ear/Legends|ears]], sharp teeth, small [[Nose/Legends|noses]] and whiskers, and were covered in [[Hair/Legends|fur]]. This fur could vary in [[Color/Legends|color]], from gold to blue to white. Their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] also differed in color from individual to individual, with green and orange being two such hues. The species had two [[Gender/Legends|genders]]: male and female; females of the species possessed hair on their heads, which could be shot through with streaks. Some male Cantrosians also had hair, though some others did not. Their [[Claw/Legends|claws]], which featured on all five fingers of their paws,<ref name="Meow" /> could inflict [[Cantrosian-scratch fever]].<ref name="CN2">''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]''</ref> Cantrosians also wore [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] such as [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuits]] and [[Boot/Legends|boots]].<ref name="Meow" />

==Society and culture==
{{Quote|I say we put them to the torture! They'll answer our questions readily, if the persuasion is right!|A Cantrosian Rebel discussing the possibility of torturing captives|<ref name="Meow" />}}
[[File:Minkacampsout.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Cantrosian fur could be any of a wide variety of colors]]
Cantrosians were a reasonably advanced species, possessing the ability to create [[Fire/Legends|fire]], [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] such as the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], and handle [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. They also had an understanding of political ideology, with many—if not all—Cantrosians swearing staunch loyalty to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Cantros 7]] had a [[Capital of Cantros 7|capital]]. Some Cantrosians were not against [[Torture/Legends|torture]] if they deemed it necessary.<ref name="Meow" />

==History==
===A people divided===
{{Quote|What's the good of overthrowing tyrants…if we become tyrants ourselves in doing it? Don't you see? How we do things is just as important as what we do.|Niru, speaking to her faction|<ref name="Meow" />}}
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the Cantrosian male [[Durne]] was hired by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Knife]]—who was himself working to destabilize the [[Saijo sector/Legends|Saijo sector]] on behalf of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]]—to sow discord among his people by framing some Cantrosians as sympathizers of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="HSref">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}</ref> and thus dividing the Rebels into factions. Durne completed the task, which led to each side fleeing Cantros 7, and finding bases in other regions. Durne joined one of the factions and pretended to befriend [[Minka]] and [[Sami (Cantrosian)|Sami]], two of its members. Minka and several others were dispatched on a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] mission to a base in the [[Cantros system/Legends|Cantros system]], where another faction had fled.<ref name="Meow" />

After collecting information, the spies flew to nearby [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] to inform their allies of their findings, but three Cantrosian-piloted [[BTL-A4 Y-wing assault starfighter/bomber|Y-wing starfighters]] from the other faction pursued them, killing several pilots on Minka's team. Minka managed to survive, but her fighter was badly damaged, and crashed on Saijo. [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Rebellion figureheads]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] happened to be on that planet, and used the [[Laser cannon/Legends|cannons]] on the ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'' to neutralize the Y-wings. Once Minka recovered, the heroes of the Rebellion took her to Saijo, where she introduced them to the other Cantrosians of her faction. Minka and Sami decided to fight back but Durne, keen to maintain his charade, fabricated a cover story and snuck over to the enemy base.<ref name="Meow" />

===A people united===
[[File:Minkamain.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Minka during the Cantros conspiracy]]
As the assemblage traveled in the ''Millennium Falcon'' to the opposing faction's planet, they were fired upon by more rival Y-wings, and the ''Falcon'' was forced into a landing at a gully on the asteroid. Sami, Solo and Skywalker were taken captive by the Cantrosians there, while Minka and Organa managed to escape. At the base, Sami and his companions were threatened with torture, but the faction's leader [[Niru]] demurred, stating that torture was the way of the Empire, which revealed her faction's true loyalties. Making a prompt appearance, Durne inflamed the situation by encouraging Niru to torture their captives. An enraged Sami, along with Solo, called Durne out on his treachery and assured Niru that they, too, were Rebels.<ref name="Meow" />

Minka and Organa arrived and disarmed Durne, which sparked a [[Skirmish in the Cantros system|firefight]] when the faction mistook the two for possible Imperials. Niru refused to fire and attempted to calm the situation but Durne, assuming that if Niru died from an 'unidentified source' he would be back in control, tried to take her by surprise. Skywalker activated his lightsaber and deflected Durne's fire, disabling him. Witnessing this, the assembled Cantrosians realized the truth of the deception. While Solo explained the misunderstanding, Durne attempted to escape, but Niru was able to capture him. With tensions defused, the Cantrosians decided to return to Cantros 7 and live in harmony there. They took Durne with them, with an eye to discovering the truth through honorable interrogation.<ref name="Meow" />

==Cantrosians in the galaxy==
At least two Cantrosians were present on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="CN2" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]];<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> after rebuking a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] for colliding with him, [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] reporter [[Den Dhur]] spotted the pair and reflected that he would have been more polite toward them, due to the risk of contracting Cantrosian-scratch fever if he annoyed them.<ref name="CN2" /> One elderly female Cantrosian resided on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] as of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="ERC" /> where she cooked [[pashi noodles]] at a street stall; Imperial pilot and eventual Rebel [[Juno Eclipse/Legends|Juno Eclipse]] was one of her customers.<ref name="FU2N">[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (novelization)|''Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II'' novelization]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Cantrosian species first appeared in the [[1984]] [[Marvel Comics]] issue [[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]], drawn by [[Sal Buscema]] and colored by [[Petra Scotese]].<ref name="Meow" /> The species was named in [[Michael Reaves]]' [[2008]] novel ''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]''.<ref name="CN2" />
